message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam sequenceMessageFontName Courier

participant "VideoDecoder" as VideoDecoder
participant "VideoEncoder" as VideoEncoder
participant "RTPReceiver" as RTPReceiver
participant "Transcoder" as Transcoder
participant "DTLS" as DTLS
participant "AudioUDPClient" as AudioUDPClient

activate RTPReceiver
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : Receive RTP
deactivate RTPReceiver

activate DTLS
DTLS -> DTLS : SignalReceivedEvent
activate DTLS
DTLS -> DTLS : OnSignalReceived
deactivate DTLS

activate RTPReceiver
